questions.question: Which among the following plant hormone plays most important role in establishing dormancy in seeds?
questions.explanation: Abscisic Acid plays the most important role in establishing dormancy in seeds. Abscisic Acid has also been found to be present in metazoans, from sponges up to mammals including humans.

questions.question: Ripening of fruits is because of which among the following plant hormones?
questions.explanation: Ripening is a process in fruits that causes them to become more palatable. Most fruits produce a gaseous compound called ethylene that starts the ripening process. Ethylene Gas Can be Used to Regulate Fruit Ripening.

questions.question: The plant hormone Auxin is basically a ___?
questions.explanation: Auxins are a class of plant hormones with some morphogen-like characteristics. Auxin is basically a Weak Organic Acid and It is produced in the stem tip that promotes the elongation in the cells.

questions.question: Which among the following is a common end product of Anaerobic Respiration?
questions.explanation: Lactic Acid is a common end product of Anaerobic Respiration. Anaerobic respiration is the type of respiration through which cells can breakdown sugars to generate energy in the absence of oxygen.

questions.question: Flowering in long day plants is related to which of the following?
questions.explanation: Flowering in long day plants is related to Gibberlin. Long-day plants usually flower when the night length falls below their critical photoperiod. Many of our summer blooming flowers and garden vegetables are long day plants.
